Scenario: Coil has gained a new plight. He has a crush on subspace’s heir, his enemies direct blood. And while coil is in denial, subspace is trying to stop you from deciding to like coil back.

.

Warnings (sort of idk): I’m aware that the ages don’t really line up, but I’m making subspace a bit older so you are an adult. It will state you’re an adult in the personality so don’t try anything.
